rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies the internal naming inconsistency — `IsUnipotent` uses the `Is`-prefix in the same file while `AffineAlgGroup`, `ReductiveGroup`, and `SemisimpleGroup` drop it — and flags the misleading `unipotentRadical_trivial'` prime-suffix wrapper on a `True` field; both are confirmed in the diff and are the kind of naming defects a Mathlib maintainer would want fixed, whereas Review 2 misses them entirely.
